summary: Iteration 98: Invoice OCR Panel + Vendor Consolidation. Backend: 20/20 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: Invoice OCR panel NOT accessible from sidebar - panel is registered but not added to sidebar menu.

ui_bugs.issue: Invoice OCR panel (invoice-ocr) is registered in panel-registry.ts but NOT added to sidebar menu in Sidebar.tsx

integration_issues.issue: Panel registered at line 177 and 672 in panel-registry.ts but missing from sidebar menu (Financial & Purchasing section at line 152-160 in Sidebar.tsx)

action_items: Add invoice-ocr panel to sidebar menu in /app/client/components/site/Sidebar.tsx under 'Financial & Purchasing' section (around line 159)
Example: { id: 'invoice-ocr', label: 'Invoice Intelligence', icon: ScanLine, panelId: 'invoice-ocr' }
critical_code_review_comments: Invoice OCR panel is fully implemented with 3 tabs (Scan & Map, Learned Mappings, Item Catalog) but not accessible from UI
Panel-registry has invoice-ocr registered but sidebar menu is missing the entry
All backend APIs for item-mapping are working correctly (catalog, stats, match, approve, mappings)

success_rate.frontend: Unable to test - panel not accessible from sidebar

seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data (30 catalog items, 12 vendors in pr_vendors)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 98 tested vendor consolidation (pr_vendors collection with 12 vendors) and item-mapping endpoints. All backend APIs working: GET /api/procurement/vendor-scorecards, GET /api/purchasing/vendors, GET /api/item-mapping/catalog (30 items), GET /api/item-mapping/stats, POST /api/item-mapping/match, POST /api/item-mapping/approve, GET /api/item-mapping/mappings. The InvoiceOCR panel component exists at /app/client/modules/InvoiceOCR/index.tsx with data-testid='invoice-ocr-panel' and tabs (invoice-tab-scan, invoice-tab-mapping, invoice-tab-catalog). However, the panel is NOT in the sidebar menu - needs to be added to /app/client/components/site/Sidebar.tsx in the 'financial' group (line 152-160).

backend_tests: POST /api/item-mapping/match - item has best_match with confidence (PASSED)
frontend_tests: Invoice OCR panel accessibility - FAILED (panel not in sidebar menu)

item_mapping.match_endpoint: Working - fuzzy matching with confidence scores
